ops.body: Criterion rewritten: the original ('leaves an executable cc-present on PATH') encoded the red-herring check — the binary is by-design invoked by absolute path and never on PATH. Replaced with the plugin-root + install-log acceptance, verified 2026-07-05T10:47:34Z on yasyf-home (hardened hook downloaded v0.2.1, log written, test -x passed, --version 0.2.1).
